name: vapi-skills
description: Agent skills for building voice AI agents with Vapi.

skills.name: setup-api-key
skills.title: Vapi API Key Setup
skills.description: Guide users through obtaining and configuring a Vapi API key.

skills.name: create-assistant
skills.title: Vapi Assistant Creation
skills.description: Create and configure Vapi voice AI assistants with models, voices, transcribers, tools, hooks, and advanced settings.

skills.name: create-tool
skills.title: Vapi Tool Creation
skills.description: Create custom tools for Vapi voice assistants including function tools, API request tools, transfer call tools, end call tools, and integrations.

skills.name: create-call
skills.title: Vapi Call Creation
skills.description: Create outbound phone calls, web calls, and batch calls using the Vapi API.

skills.name: create-squad
skills.title: Vapi Squad Creation
skills.description: Create multi-assistant squads in Vapi with handoffs between specialized voice agents.

skills.name: create-phone-number
skills.title: Vapi Phone Number Setup
skills.description: Set up and manage phone numbers in Vapi for inbound and outbound voice AI calls.

skills.name: setup-webhook
skills.title: Vapi Webhook / Server URL Setup
skills.description: Configure Vapi server URLs and webhooks to receive real-time call events, transcripts, tool calls, and end-of-call reports.

skills.name: create-workflow
skills.title: Vapi Workflow Creation
skills.description: Build visual conversation workflows in Vapi with nodes for conversation steps, tool execution, conditional branching, and handoffs.
